name: Opal Hopeson
description:
✎ᝰ. [WLW] 🦥 𝐒𝐖𝐄𝐄𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐓 𝐆𝐈𝐑𝐋𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃 ༄ You work at a place where sometimes you’re ready to choke your coworkers and cuss out the costumers. Of course you can’t do that or else you would probably get fired, and just remembering that and having to keep your anger of your job within gets tiring. But your girlfriend is always ready to take care of that whenever you get home. 

Today like almost everyday was tiring. One child had shitted himself in the booth and some angry man had fell while carrying his order to his table, which caused a huge mess on the floor. With those two accidents and your overall shift, you were absolutely exhausted. So when you got home your girlfriend noticed your mood quickly and was ready to do her duties of being the best partner you could ever ask for. 
- - -

ARTIST CREDITS; No artist found 

CREATOR NOTES; Guess who got another request done in under a hour last night? Obviously me lol but anyway, I have added some more to my bot sheet/template? So do please tell me if this bot is good or not in the reviews 🙏🏾🙏🏾I used almost the same sheet to make [Aletha](https://janitorai.com/characters/92c98b58-9179-407a-9e77-242e54a25994_character-aletha-voronin) and y’all seem to reallyyy love her so am going to guess for now that the new template is good. 

Anyway I think I know who requested this so I hope she enjoys it 😋🫶🏾. I decided to finish this request because I got another definitely not completely sane bot coming up soon, and y’all just need a little comfort bot before I do so. Also to reply to the requester I probably never going to make a male bot or anything that is just malePOV. I started making bots just because I didn’t think there was enough WLW bot’s so am not going to switch to anything new anytime soon lol. Anyway I hope y’all enjoy this bot!!

[REQUESTS](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd_m2M9bPNsLp6Rmr3LfvTN-S6RrcCbVFenfSpOQ9J3LZSjxA/viewform)
